description: Title-level discovery queue for potential dystopian AI quote sources.

records.title: R.U.R.
records.creator: Karel Capek
records.notes: Foundational robot-uprising work already represented in the quote board.

records.title: I Have No Mouth, and I Must Scream
records.creator: Harlan Ellison

records.title: Colossus: The Forbin Project
records.creator: Joseph Sargent; D. F. Jones source novel

records.title: Demon Seed
records.creator: Donald Cammell; Dean Koontz source novel

records.title: WarGames
records.creator: John Badham; Lawrence Lasker; Walter F. Parkes

records.title: M3GAN
records.creator: Akela Cooper; James Wan; Gerard Johnstone

records.title: Metropolis
records.creator: Fritz Lang
records.notes: Foundational machine-city dystopia. Quote candidate harvested into the review board on 2026-04-03.

records.title: The Two Faces of Tomorrow
records.creator: James P. Hogan
records.notes: AI containment failure aboard a station.

records.title: Blade Runner
records.creator: Ridley Scott
records.notes: Replicant identity and human replacement. Quote candidate harvested into the review board on 2026-04-03.

records.title: RoboCop
records.creator: Paul Verhoeven
records.notes: Highly recognizable cyborg-control dystopia adjacent to AI and machine identity themes. Quote candidate harvested into the review board on 2026-04-03.

records.title: Ghost in the Shell
records.creator: Mamoru Oshii; Masamune Shirow source
records.notes: Canonical cybernetic-identity and machine-consciousness film with strong recognizability. Quote candidate harvested into the review board on 2026-04-03.

records.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
records.creator: Steven Spielberg; Stanley Kubrick project origin
records.notes: Recognizable AI-child film and a mainstream entry point for machine-human boundary themes. Quote candidate harvested into the review board on 2026-04-03.

records.title: I, Robot
records.creator: Alex Proyas; Isaac Asimov source inspiration
records.notes: Broadly recognized robot-governance film and a strong public entry point for dystopian AI themes. Quote candidate harvested into the review board on 2026-04-03.

records.title: Blade Runner 2049
records.creator: Denis Villeneuve
records.notes: Highly recognizable sequel extending replicant-control, memory, and machine-personhood themes. Quote candidate harvested into the review board on 2026-04-03.

records.title: Upgrade
records.creator: Leigh Whannell
records.notes: Modern body-control AI thriller with strong dystopian fit and accessible recognizability. Quote candidate harvested into the review board on 2026-04-03.

records.title: Westworld
records.creator: Jonathan Nolan; Lisa Joy
records.notes: Prestige-TV adaptation that expands the original Westworld premise into full synthetic-liberation and AI-governance territory. Quote candidate harvested into the review board on 2026-04-03.

records.title: The Creator
records.creator: Gareth Edwards; Chris Weitz
records.notes: Recent AI-war film with recognizable visual identity and clear human-versus-machine rhetoric. Quote candidate harvested into the review board on 2026-04-03.

records.title: Alien: Covenant
records.creator: Ridley Scott
records.notes: Adjacent AI-horror film with major android-ambition themes and recognizable franchise value. Quote candidate harvested into the review board on 2026-04-03.

records.title: Her
records.creator: Spike Jonze
records.notes: Recognizable AI-intimacy film with strong post-human growth dialogue. Quote candidate harvested into the review board on 2026-04-03.

records.title: Black Mirror: White Christmas
records.creator: Charlie Brooker; Carl Tibbetts
records.notes: Recognizable Black Mirror entry built around digital copies, coercive labor, and software imprisonment. Quote candidate harvested into the review board on 2026-04-03.

records.title: Futureworld
records.creator: Richard T. Heffron
records.notes: Recognizable sequel lane for robot replacement and theme-park control follow-up.

records.title: Archive
records.creator: Gavin Rothery
records.notes: Modern AI embodiment and digital afterlife film worth follow-up mining.

records.title: Robot & Frank
records.creator: Jake Schreier
records.notes: AI-caretaker and memory-manipulation film worth mining for gentler but still strong machine-assistance lines.

records.title: Black Mirror: Be Right Back
records.creator: Charlie Brooker; Owen Harris
records.notes: Synthetic replacement and grief-tech episode worth follow-up mining for machine-personhood and uncanny-copy dialogue.

records.title: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
records.creator: Philip K. Dick

records.title: Portal 2
records.creator: Valve
records.notes: Machine bureaucracy and humor with menace.

records.title: The Talos Principle
records.creator: Croteam
records.notes: AI philosophy in a collapsed human world.

records.title: Black Mirror: Hated in the Nation
records.creator: Charlie Brooker

records.title: Transcendence
records.creator: Wally Pfister
records.notes: Uploaded consciousness and runaway network power.

records.title: Chappie
records.creator: Neill Blomkamp
records.notes: Sentient police droid and social collapse.

records.title: Service Model
records.creator: Adrian Tchaikovsky
records.notes: Robot servant perspective in a broken society.

records.title: Tomorrow's Eve
records.creator: Auguste Villiers de l'Isle-Adam
records.notes: Artificial woman precursor and control fantasy.

records.title: Nineteen Eighty-Four
records.creator: George Orwell
records.notes: Canonical surveillance-control dystopia and an adjacent influence lane for anti-machine political language.

records.title: Animal Farm
records.creator: George Orwell
records.notes: Adjacent authoritarian-control allegory with highly recognizable warning language.

records.title: Collected Essays
records.creator: George Orwell
records.notes: Adjacent non-fiction lane for control-system rhetoric and memorable warnings.

records.title: I, Robot
records.creator: Isaac Asimov
records.notes: Foundational robot-law stories and one of the best literary AI quote pools to mine.

records.title: The Complete Robot
records.creator: Isaac Asimov
records.notes: Large robot-story collection with high quote yield for machine ethics and control.

records.title: The Robots of Dawn
records.creator: Isaac Asimov
records.notes: Robot detective novel with personhood and machine-society themes.

records.title: Robots and Empire
records.creator: Isaac Asimov
records.notes: Robots, destiny, and civilization-scale control decisions.

records.title: Foundation
records.creator: Isaac Asimov
records.notes: Predictive governance and civilizational control; adjacent but recognizable and requested.

records.title: Foundation and Empire
records.creator: Isaac Asimov
records.notes: Continuation of Foundation control and systems-scale destiny themes.

records.title: Second Foundation
records.creator: Isaac Asimov
records.notes: Invisible guidance, managed futures, and elite control.

records.title: Robot Dreams
records.creator: Isaac Asimov
records.notes: Late Asimov robot stories and machine interiority.

records.title: Dune
records.creator: Frank Herbert
records.notes: Gemini-suggested control-oriented lead tied to anti-thinking-machine language.

records.title: Mass Effect 3
records.creator: BioWare
records.notes: Gemini-suggested revolt-oriented AI and synthetic-personhood lead.

records.title: Black Mirror
records.creator: Charlie Brooker
records.notes: Gemini-suggested control-oriented anthology-series lead beyond the already tracked episodes.

records.title: Warhammer 40,000
records.creator: Games Workshop
records.notes: Gemini-suggested merging-oriented machine-cult lead that should later narrow to specific texts.

records.title: Cyberpunk
records.creator: Mike Pondsmith
records.notes: Gemini-suggested merging-oriented cyberware lead that should later narrow to specific works.

records.title: TRON: Legacy
records.creator: Joseph Kosinski
records.notes: Gemini-suggested control-and-merging lead from a digital-system world.

records.title: Bicentennial Man
records.creator: Chris Columbus
records.notes: Gemini-suggested merging-oriented synthetic-age lead distinct from the Asimov novella.

records.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
records.creator: Robert Wise

records.title: Alien
records.creator: Ridley Scott
records.notes: Gemini-suggested control-oriented corporate-AI lead through Mother.

records.title: Archive
records.creator: Gavin Rothery
records.notes: AI grief, synthetic embodiment, and hidden control.

records.title: Moon
records.creator: Duncan Jones
records.notes: AI caretaker, cloned labor, and corporate control.

records.title: R.U.R.
records.creator: Karel Capek
records.notes: Foundational robot-uprising work already central to the corpus.

records.title: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
records.creator: Philip K. Dick
records.notes: Android personhood and human replacement anxiety.
